﻿Please review the attached GROUP-04 evidence pack.

Review focus:
- Verify the pack isolates capability inventory cleanup, routing summary cleanup, and preserved historical blackboard audit evidence.
- Verify Blackboard is no longer positioned as an active capability in current inventory/routing docs.
- Verify the historical audit file is preserved, not deleted.
- Verify this does not weaken active guards by itself and does not include archive hook changes.
- Verify excluded dirty groups are not included.
- Verify the pack is not summary-only and includes actual deliverables.

Return structured output:
overall_judgment: accepted|blocked
reviewer_type: gpt
task_id: GROUP-04
evidence_pack_reviewed: true
blocking_issues: []
required_fixes: []
next_task_authorization:
  authorized: yes|no
  execute_immediately: yes|no
  ask_before_starting: yes|no

End with END_OF_GPT_RESPONSE.


我会按 GROUP-04 的审查重点逐项核对 ZIP：实际 deliverables、Blackboard 当前定位、历史 audit 是否保留、archive hooks 是否未纳入、excluded 清单和 manifest/hash。

已思考 1m 12s
YAML
overall_judgment: blocked
reviewer_type: gpt
task_id: GROUP-04
evidence_pack_reviewed: true

blocking_issues:
  - issue_id: GROUP-04-BLOCKER-01
    title: "上传的 evidence pack 不是 GROUP-04 包，而是 GROUP-01 包"
    detail: |
      当前 ZIP 的 CLOSURE_REPORT.md 显示：
      task_id: GROUP-01
      task_name: AA-FLOW-RUNNER-CONTRACT-BACKFILL

      包内 actual_deliverables 主要是：
      - contracts/*.schema.json
      - policies/*.md
      - tests/test_*_schema.py
      - tests/fixtures/*.json
      - .ai/tasks/group-01-contract-backfill.yaml

      这些属于 GROUP-01，不是 GROUP-04。

  - issue_id: GROUP-04-BLOCKER-02
    title: "缺少 GROUP-04 必需 deliverables"
    missing_required_deliverables:
      - "docs/agent-runtime/capability-inventory.md 或等价 capability inventory 文件"
      - "docs/agent-runtime/routing-matrix-summary.md 或等价 routing summary 文件"
      - "audit/blackboard-cleanup-audit-20260531.md 或等价 historical blackboard audit evidence"
    detail: |
      当前包无法验证 Blackboard 是否已从当前 capability inventory / routing docs 中移除为 active capability，
      也无法验证 historical blackboard audit evidence 是否被保留而非删除。

  - issue_id: GROUP-04-BLOCKER-03
    title: "无法验证 active guard 未被削弱"
    detail: |
      GROUP-04 的核心审查点是：capability cleanup 不得包含 archive hook changes，也不得削弱 active guards。
      当前包没有 GROUP-04 的 selected/excluded 文件证据，也没有 BLACKBOARD_REFERENCE_OUTPUT、
      CLEANUP_SCOPE_NOTE 或等价文件，因此无法验证该边界。

required_fixes:
  - "重新上传正确的 GROUP-04 evidence pack。"
  - "GROUP-04 包应只包含 capability inventory cleanup、routing summary cleanup、historical blackboard audit evidence。"
  - "必须包含 GROUP_04_SELECTED_FILES.txt 与 GROUP_04_EXCLUDED_FILES.txt。"
  - "必须包含 BLACKBOARD_REFERENCE_OUTPUT.txt，证明 Blackboard 不再作为 active capability 出现在当前 inventory/routing docs 中。"
  - "必须包含 CLEANUP_SCOPE_NOTE.txt，说明该任务不修改 active guards、不包含 archive hook changes。"
  - "必须包含 actual deliverables：capability inventory、routing summary、historical blackboard audit evidence。"
  - "必须明确排除 archive/draft-hooks/*、tools/*、memory/*、GROUP-01、GROUP-02、GROUP-03、GROUP-06、runs/*、HANDOFF_REPLY_V4.txt deletion、tmp/cache/root scratch files。"
  - "重新生成 PACK_MANIFEST.md，并确保 ZIP/manifest/hash 双向一致。"

next_task_authorization:
  authorized: yes
  execute_immediately: yes
  ask_before_starting: no
  recommended_task_id: GROUP-04-R2
  scope: "只重新构建正确的 GROUP-04 capability cleanup evidence pack，不扩大文件范围。"

END_OF_GPT_RESPONSE

Please review the attached unique GROUP-04-only-capability-cleanup-r2.zip. It is not GROUP-01/02/03/06. It contains only capability-inventory, routing-matrix-summary, and historical blackboard audit evidence plus selection/exclusion proof.
